crime.value: Multiple murders including shooting of Camille Dawn, and murder of Cassandra Martins (Dawn) and her husband; rape and stabbing
crime.quote: BANG! Was the only sound Camille Dawn had heard the moment she opened the door to her loft.

victim.value: Camille Dawn (shot at her loft) and Cassandra Martins/Dawn (Jack Dawn Sr.'s daughter, raped and stabbed with husband)
victim.quote: Cassandra Martins, formaly known as Cassandra Dawn... He's Jack Dawn Sr.'s oldest daughter.

closed_world.value: Bronx crime family territory - Dawn family connections limit suspects to those within organized crime circles
closed_world.quote: He's one of Bronx's top five crime mobsters out of twenty-seven in all of New York.

culprit_and_motive.value: Italian-accented assassin working for unknown employer, motive unclear but connected to Dawn crime family
culprit_and_motive.quote: It's done... What do you want me to do with the body? - said with heavy gravely Italian accent

investigator.value: Detective Dax, who has personal history with the Dawn family and dated Cassandra in high school
investigator.quote: I dated her in high school but it didn't last long... complications between are fathers

suspect_architecture.value: Italian hitman with accomplice executing organized hits; Dawn crime family with internal conflicts; missing child as potential witness
suspect_architecture.quote: It's done. He says with a heavy gravely Italian accent. What do you want me to do with the body?

clue_fairness.value: Blood trail and apartment door left open providing physical evidence accessible to both detective and reader
clue_fairness.quote: he realized the fourth door to the left open and he realized some blood on the wall across from the apartment

social_world.value: Bronx organized crime hierarchy with Jack Dawn Sr. as retired mobster, son Jack Jr. taking over weapons/drug business
social_world.quote: He's one of Bronx's top five crime mobsters out of twenty-seven in all of New York.

investigator_wound.value: Detective Dax's personal connection to victims - dated Cassandra in high school, knows the Dawn family history
investigator_wound.quote: Yeah, I did He opens the bottle and takes a gulp then spits the water onto the pavement.

_meta.title: ebook erin clerity death before dishonor
